title: Mojank Loading Screen
description: Replaces the Minecraft loading screen with the Mojank logo from The Fabric Project discord.
body:
Replaces the Mojang Studios loading screen with the Mojank emoji from The Fabric Project discord

I use everything I create on [Alinea.gg](https://alinea.gg/), it's a comfy SMP server, feel free to check it out <3
